title: Head Cosmetics
description: Fun Cosmetics to customize your character!
body:
### Stylish hats for character customization, enhancing looks with unique flair.

# Here is instruction how to download the Pack
- Download: ([OptiFine](https://optifine.net/downloads)) or ([CIT-Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) + [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/))
- Install optifine
- Add the texture pack into your "resourcepacks" folder and you are ready to go!
- If you donwload [CIT-Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) + [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/), no need to use [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/downloads)

# After you launch

- Here are some of the items and how to equip!
- Get a "CARVED PUMPKIN" and rename it to 11 unique hats!

### New Items: Slime, Brainger, Herobrine
### Returning Styles: Steve, Plunger
### New Styles: Brainger, Herobrine
### Removed Styles: Halloween Relatiks
### All Items are: Sniffer Hat, Straw Hat, relatiks, Creeper, Steve, Enderman Hat, Top Hat, Farmer Hat, Michael Myers, Knife, Plunger, Witch Hat, Halo, Paper Bag, Brainger, Herobrine, Slime.

- The item you rename need to be a CARVED PUMPKIN
- So to carve a pumpkin
- Right click a pumpkin with Shears.
